schema: score 0-100 (50=neutral); direction positive|negative|neutral; materiality normal|material_negative|material_positive; confidence high|medium|low. EVENT signal only — no routine results/dividends (fundamentals layer covers those).

PSO.summary: ECC approved a Rs100bn sovereign-guaranteed financing facility to ease PSO's liquidity/circular-debt strain; additional Oman oil cargoes secured.
headlines: PSO & Oman Trading discuss provision of additional oil cargoes

TREET.summary: Treet Battery signed an MoU with China's CNTE (CATL-backed) to develop energy-storage solutions and potential local assembly.
headlines: Treet Battery Limited Signs MOU with CNTE

AIRLINK.summary: Establishing an 8-acre Sundar SEZ production facility (1.4mn sq ft, 1MW solar) and launched Hisense in Pakistan — major manufacturing expansion.
headlines: Expanding operations: Air Link to establish production facility in Lahore
Airlink officially launches Hisense in Pakistan

MEBL.summary: Added to the MZNPI index (June 10, replacing PAEL) — passive-flow tailwind; plans 100-150 new branches in CY26.
headlines: Meezan Bank replaces PEL in MZNPI

SYS.summary: Lahore High Court sanctioned the amalgamation with Confiz (effective Jan 1, 2026); issuing 57.6mn new shares — IT-services consolidation.
headlines: LHC greenlights Systems Limited's amalgamation with Confiz

LUCK.summary: Congo (NYA JV) capacity expansion to 2.91 MTPA and Iraq Samawah plant online; Rs1.2bn into National Resources copper/gold mining — offshore + diversification.
headlines: Lucky Cement supercharges Congo capacity with major expansion

FFC.summary: Signed a $1.12bn coal-to-urea FEED agreement under CPEC 2.0 (717k tpa urea, commissioning 2030-31); PEF gas-supply pact with Mari Energies.
headlines: Fauji Fertilizer inks $1.12bn project under CPEC 2.0

MARI.summary: New Shams-1 gas/condensate discovery in Ghotki (~48 MMSCFD); Spinwam-1 Waziristan production commenced; secured 11 new exploration blocks.
headlines: Mari Energies discovers gas in Sindh
Production from Spinwam-1 well in Waziristan commences

HUBC.summary: Gharo CKD auto plant (25k units/yr) and BYD EV local assembly both due H2 2026; building a Karachi-Peshawar EV charging network; exploring an aluminium smelter.
headlines: HUBCO's Gharo plant set to come online in second half of 2026, eyes 25,000 vehicles annually

ENGROH.summary: Lotte Chemical non-binding offer for ~56% of Engro Polymer (EPCL); board approved a buyback of up to 45mn shares; Deodar tower portfolio to 15,012.
headlines: Engro Corp gets Lotte Chemical non-binding offer for majority stake in EPCL
Engro Holdings board proposes buyback of up to 45mn shares

NML.summary: Nishat-led consortium to acquire ~75% of Rafhan Maize; expanding solar (+4MW), open-end yarn capacity, and Rs5bn into Nishat Sutas Dairy.
headlines: Nishat-linked consortium eyes 75% control of RMPL

FCCL.summary: Partnering with KAPCO to acquire ~84% of Attock Cement via public offer — sector consolidation / capacity expansion.
headlines: Fauji Cement, KAPCO kick off Attock Cement takeover

MLCF.summary: Public offer for 69.75% of Pioneer Cement (~$270.5mn) — large M&A-led capacity expansion, sizeable capital outlay.
headlines: Maple Leaf Cement to acquire majority stake in Pioneer Cement for $270.5mn

CPHL.summary: Board approved 100% acquisition of Pakheim International Pharmaceuticals; launched Citi Veterinary subsidiary and approved biological/insulin and antibiotic plants.
headlines: CPHL targets full takeover of Pakheim International Pharmaceuticals

SEARL.summary: Acquired Searle IV Solutions & SVPL (Rs7.25bn); transferring biologic portfolio to Nextar (up to Rs4bn) and divesting 90.6% of Searle Pakistan to an IJARA-led consortium — portfolio restructuring.
headlines: Searle acquires Searle IV Solutions and SVPL in Rs7.25bn deal

HCAR.summary: Plans a hybrid model and a Rs5bn hybrid assembly plant (no firm timeline) as auto policy shifts toward eco-friendly vehicles.
headlines: Honda Atlas to launch hybrid model in Pakistan with advanced sensing tech

OGDC.summary: Bobi Deep-1 oil & gas discovery in Sindh (2,000 bpd + 1.1 MMSCFD) — fresh reserve-add catalyst.
headlines: Bobi Deep-1 in Sindh: OGDC makes significant oil and gas discovery

PPL.summary: Added to JSMFI as leading constituent (19.65% weight) in the June 5 rebalancing — passive-flow tailwind.
headlines: PSX recomposes MII30, JSMFI

DGKC.summary: Added to JSMFI (16.53% weight) in the June 5 rebalancing — passive-flow tailwind.
headlines: PSX recomposes MII30, JSMFI

PAEL.summary: Removed from the MZNPI index (replaced by MEBL) — passive-flow headwind; partly offset by structural US transformer-export expansion ($44mn orders).
headlines: Meezan Bank replaces PEL in MZNPI

ATRL.summary: Removed from JSMFI effective June 5, 2026 — passive-flow headwind for refinery names.
headlines: PSX recomposes MII30, JSMFI

NRL.summary: Removed from JSMFI effective June 5, 2026 — passive-flow headwind for refinery names.
headlines: PSX recomposes MII30, JSMFI

PRL.summary: Removed from JSMFI effective June 5, 2026 — passive-flow headwind for refinery names.
headlines: PSX recomposes MII30, JSMFI

SNGP.summary: Govt kept gas prices unchanged; SNGPL to work with OGRA on RLNG-to-domestic profit-calculation mechanism — regulatory uncertainty.
headlines: Gas prices kept unchanged: SNGPL, SSGCL will work with regulator on profit calculation

SSGC.summary: Govt gas-price freeze; SSGCL under the same OGRA profit-calculation review — sector pricing headwinds.
headlines: Gas prices kept unchanged: SNGPL, SSGCL will work with regulator on profit calculation

SAZEW.summary: Auto Policy 2016-21 concessional period ending June 2026; used-car imports at 40% regulatory duty may pressure local assembler volumes.
headlines: Sazgar Engineering Works Limited — BR Research
